# Payzoris — Full Site Reference
> Virtual cards, infinite possibilities.

## About

Payzoris is a virtual card platform that enables users to create secure virtual cards instantly for online shopping, subscriptions, and business expenses. The platform provides spend control, fraud protection, and multi-device management.

URL: https://payzoris.lepem.xyz

## Features

### Instant Virtual Cards
Generate unlimited virtual cards in seconds. Each card comes with its own unique number, CVV, and customizable spending limits. Perfect for one-time purchases, subscriptions, and recurring payments.

### Spend Control
Set per-card spending limits, lock or freeze cards instantly, and receive real-time notifications for every transaction. Full visibility and control over where your money goes.

### Privacy First
Your real card details stay completely hidden. Every virtual card acts as a secure shield against fraud and data breaches. No merchant ever sees your actual banking details.

### Multi-Device Management
Manage all your virtual cards from web, iOS, and Android apps. Your wallet syncs seamlessly across all your devices.

### No Hidden Fees
Transparent pricing with zero annual fees. Pay only for what you use — no surprises, no fine print.

### Global Acceptance
Use your Payzoris cards anywhere Visa and Mastercard are accepted — online and in-store with Apple Pay and Google Pay.

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Cards | Monthly Limit |
|------|-------|-------|---------------|
| Starter | Free | 3 | $500 |
| Pro | $9/mo | Unlimited | $10,000 |
| Business | $29/mo | Unlimited | $100,000 |

## How It Works

1. **Create an Account** — Sign up in under 60 seconds. No credit check, no paperwork. Just your email and a secure password.
2. **Generate Your Card** — Name your card, set a spending limit, and choose single-use or recurring. Your virtual card is ready instantly.
3. **Spend with Confidence** — Use it anywhere online. Track every transaction in real-time. Freeze, delete, or top up with one click.

## Technical Details

- PCI DSS Compliant
- 256-Bit Encryption
- GDPR Compliant
- BETA — 10,000+ Active Users
